title: Fix Gemini API 404 Error - Correct Endpoint URL and Request Format

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts to hardcode the correct Gemini Vision API endpoint URL: `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent`. The `buildGeminiUrl(apiKey)` helper must append the API key as a query parameter (`?key=<apiKey>`). Remove any dynamic endpoint construction that could produce malformed URLs missing the API version, model name, or `:generateContent` suffix. Add inline comments documenting the required URL structure.

quotes: Erro 404: Endpoint não encontrado. Verifique a configuração da API Gemini nas configurações.

acceptanceCriteria: The Gemini endpoint URL in apiConfig.ts is exactly `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent`.
The `buildGeminiUrl` function appends `?key=<apiKey>` to the base URL.
No dynamic segment construction that could omit `/v1beta/`, the model name, or `:generateContent`.
Inline comments document each required URL component (base host, API version, model name, method suffix, key query param).

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to send Gemini API requests using the correct JSON body format. The request must use `fetch` with `method: 'POST'`, `Content-Type: application/json`, and a JSON-stringified body of the form `{ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: <prompt> }, { inlineData: { mimeType: <mimeType>, data: <base64Data> } }] }] }`. Remove any remaining multipart/form-data or FormData approach for the Gemini provider. The image must be base64-encoded before being placed in the `inlineData.data` field.
acceptanceCriteria: Requests to Gemini use `fetch` with `Content-Type: application/json` and a JSON body — no FormData.
The request body contains a `contents[0].parts` array with a text part (prompt) and an `inlineData` part (mimeType + base64 data).
The base64-encoded image data is correctly extracted from the File/Blob before sending.
A successful POST to the correct endpoint returns a 200 response with Gemini analysis output.

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx error handling to explicitly detect HTTP 404 responses from the Gemini API and display a clear, actionable Portuguese error message: 'Endpoint da API não encontrado (404). Verifique se a URL e o modelo estão configurados corretamente nas Configurações.' Include a button labeled 'Ir para Configurações' that navigates the user to the Settings page.

quotes: Erro 404: Endpoint não encontrado. Verifique a configuração da API Gemini nas configurações.

acceptanceCriteria: When a 404 HTTP error is returned by the Gemini API, the ProcessingScreen displays the Portuguese 404-specific error message.
An 'Ir para Configurações' button is rendered below the error message.
Clicking 'Ir para Configurações' navigates to the Settings page.
Other non-404 HTTP errors still display their existing error messages.

constraints: Do not change backend/main.mo as part of this fix.
Do not modify any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
The Gemini endpoint URL must remain `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent` with `?key=<apiKey>` query parameter.
nonGoals: Changing the Gemini model to a version other than gemini-1.5-flash.
Adding new settings fields or backend mutations.
Changing authentication or Internet Identity logic.
